name: bee
description: bee: validate-first agentic development skills — staged workflow with four human gates, evidence-based validation, bounded swarms over verified cells, and a compounding knowledge loop.

interface.shortDescription: Validate-first skills for agentic software delivery
interface.longDescription: Bundles the bee workflow skills: hive bootstrap and routing, exploring, planning, validating, swarming, executing, reviewing, scribing (BA-grade tech-agnostic area specs), compounding, grooming, and skill authoring. Hard gates, verified cells, bounded workers, compounding learnings.
defaultPrompt: Onboard this repository for bee and start with bee-hive.
Route a feature request through the full bee chain.
Plan and validate a feature before we write code.
Groom this repo for tech debt and drift.
